documents.title: Grafana Auth and Plugin Exposure Checks
documents.summary: Grafana deployments often expose login endpoints and plugin metadata that influence exploitability.
documents.content: Validate auth hardening, plugin list exposure, and known CVE coverage for detected Grafana versions.

documents.title: Django Debug/Admin Surface Intelligence
documents.summary: Django applications may leak debug traces or expose admin portals with weak controls.
documents.content: Check debug traces, admin URL exposure, and session/cookie policy around authentication boundaries.

documents.title: Apache HTTPD Misconfiguration Patterns
documents.summary: Apache may expose directory indexing, verbose error pages, or risky alias/proxy routes.
documents.content: Prioritize passive config checks and safe endpoint discovery before exploit verification templates.
